name: Parkour Labs
short_description: Are you good at parkour video games? Are you number 1 in surfing mode? This is your game, welcome to Parkour Labs, an experience that will test your skills.
detailed_description:
Parkour Labs returns with a major upgrade — now playable in VR.

Master speed, flow and precision in a stylized parkour experience built around movement freedom. Run, surf and chain momentum across surreal vaporwave environments designed to test both skill and immersion.

Step Inside the Movement

Experience parkour like never before — play traditionally on screen or step inside the movement with full VR support. Every jump, slide and turn is designed around fluid motion and player control, rewarding mastery and flow.

Master the Loop

Explore colorful surreal landscapes inspired by vaporwave aesthetics while chaining movement techniques, discovering shortcuts and unlocking new challenges. Precision and rhythm are key as you push your skills further with every run.

Retro Vibes, Modern Gameplay

Dive into a nostalgic world inspired by 80s and 90s visual culture, synthwave music and glitch aesthetics, blending retro atmosphere with modern movement gameplay.

Key Features

* Full VR Mode — experience parkour in immersive first-person

* Fluid movement system focused on speed and flow

* Stylized vaporwave worlds

* Skill-based gameplay rewarding mastery

* Unlock secrets, levels and movement routes

* Designed for both VR and traditional play

VR Compatibility

* Playable in Virtual Reality

* Motion controller support

* Designed for immersive movement
